channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Trails in the Sky 2nd Chapter details more characters, Orbal Arts, and cooking
item.content:encoded:
Falcom has released new information and screenshots for Trails in the Sky 2nd Chapter introducing characters Brigadier General Cassius Bright, General Morgan, Lt. Colonel Cid, Queen Alicia von Auslese, Duke Dunan Von Auslese, and Phillip Runall, as well as Orbal Arts and cooking.

Get the details below.

■ Characters

Brigadier General Cassius Bright (voiced by Kyle Hebert in English, Kenji Hamada in Japanese)

  • Age: 45

Estelle’s father, a dashing and amiable middle-aged gentleman.
After a distinguished career in the Royal Army, Cassius became a bracer. In the years that followed, he made a name for himself by completing assignments all across the continent.

Following the incident that shook Liberl in the events of 1st Chapter, he resolved to resign as a bracer and return to the military once more.

Though his recent promotion means he can’t step away from the military, Cassius keeps a watchful, fatherly eye on Estelle’s new journey from afar.

General Morgan (voiced by Richard Epcar in English, Kozo Dozaka in Japanese)

  • Age: 62

A stubborn, powerful old man who leads the entire Royal Army and commands the Border Division.

After Cassius, his right-hand man, left the army for the Bracer Guild, he developed a deep distaste for bracers. However, after witnessing Estelle and her allies’ heroic efforts during the coup incident, his hostility appears to have softened somewhat.

Though he remains in his position as general, he’s left leading the army to Cassius following Cassius’ return.

Lt. Colonel Cid (voiced by John Patneaude in English, Kengo Takanashi in Japanese)

  • Age: 32

A sincere, perhaps overserious Royal Army officer who serves as the commander of Leiston Fortress.

In addition to the swordsmanship he learned from Cassius, Cid is a versatile fighter capable of using advanced Arts. His abilities place him amongst the cream of the crop of Liberl’s Royal Army.

In recognition of his aid in preventing a catastrophic incident in the events of 1st Chapter, he was promoted from Major to Lieutenant Colonel at a remarkably young age.

Queen Alicia von Auslese (voiced by Cindy Robinson in English, Eriko Nakamura in Japanese)

  • Age: 60

The 26th monarch of Liberl, well known not only for her grace and dignity but also for her true inner strength.

Her resolute dedication to her people’s well-being over the years has earned her the respect and adoration of Liberlians of all ages.

In the wake of the incident that threatened her kingdom in 1st Chapter, Queen Alicia is prioritizing Liberl’s safety by pursuing stable relations with its surrounding nations, the neighboring Erebonian Empire and the Republic of Calvard.

Duke Dunan Von Auslese (voiced by Kyle McCarley in English, Yuta Odagaki in Japanese)

  • Age: 35

The nephew of Queen Alicia and a potential heir to the throne.

Perhaps due to his butler Phillip continuously spoiling him, Dunan is an inconceivably self-absorbed hedonist. His popularity amongst the kingdom’s people is extremely low.

During 1st Chapter, he was manipulated into serving as the figurehead of the coup attempt that threatened the kingdom. As punishment, it appears he has been confined to house arrest at the royal villa.

Phillip Runall (voiced by Doug Tompos in English, Kazuki Kyan in Japanese)

  • Age: 58

A thoughtful, well-mannered gentleman who has served as Duke Dunan’s butler for over 20 years.

Phillip was responsible for Dunan’s early education, and thus feels a heavy sense of guilt for what he sees as his own shortcomings in raising him.

Even with the Duke now under house arrest at the royal villa, Phillip continues to wile his days away dealing with his lord’s endless selfish demands.

■ Systems

◆ Upgraded Tactical Orbments: Unleash Devastating Orbal Arts!

Orbal Arts

By installing crystal circuits known as Quartz into each character’s unique Tactical Orbment, players can enhance characters’ abilities and unlock a variety of magical abilities known as Arts.

In Trails in the Sky 2nd Chapter, become stronger than ever by upgrading to the latest orbment model, which increases the number of Quartz slots from six to seven!

Plus, enhancing individual slots allows party members to equip superior Quartz, which in turn unlocks more powerful Orbal Arts!

Blue Ascension (Water)

Sylpharion (Wind)

Abyss Fall (Time)

Lost Mobius (Space)

Zodiac (Mirage)

◆ Cooking and Food Effects

Player characters can prepare recipes recorded in the Recipe Book as long as they have the required ingredients. These dishes offer various effects such as stamina recovery, status ailment recovery, or temporary stat boosts, so activating them can turn the tide of battle in your favor.

Attack Food

Upon failing to cook a dish, Attack Food will be created on occasion. In battle, Attack Food can be used to deal damage to enemies.

Cooking Effects

Some dishes can be activated from the main menu during Quick Battles, offering various effects such as increased damage dealt or gradual HP recovery. By switching from Quick Battle to Command Battle while a cooking effect is still active, the buff will stay active for up to two turns during the Command Battle.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/trails-in-the-sky-2nd-chapter-details-more-characters-orbal-arts-and-cooking
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Arc System Works Showcase 2026 set for June 24
item.content:encoded:
The latest information on titles developed and published by Arc System Works.

Arc System works will host Arc System Works Showcase 2026 on June 24 at 2:00 p.m. PT / 5:00 p.m. ET / June 25 at 06:00 JST, featuring the latest information on Arc System Works, the company announced. You will be able to watch it on YouTube (English, Japanese).

The broadcast will feature the latest information on a variety of titles developed and published by Arc System Works.

Stay tuned.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/arc-system-works-showcase-2026-set-for-june-24
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok demo now available
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch 2

Try out Story, Quest, and Tutorial modes.

A demo for Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok is now available for PlayStation 5, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, and PC via Steam, publisher Cygames and developer Cygames Osaka announced.

Here is an overview of the demo, via Cygames:

About

A gateway for newcomers to experience Granblue Fantasy: Relink, the following three modes are playable in the demo version of Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok.

Contents

  • Story Mode – Play through an early portion of the main story from Granblue Fantasy: Relink. Clear story mode to redeem rewards in the full game of Granblue Fantasy: Relink or Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok.
  • Quest Mode – Play through quests either solo or with others. Cross-play matchmaking with other platforms is available in the demo, with a total of four different quests to try. Complete the three available quests to unlock the fourth quest, “Sephira’s Sanguine Glimmer,” which allows access to Summons, an all-new battle mechanic. Each quest grants rewards upon completion that may be redeemed in the full game of Granblue Fantasy: Relink or Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok.
  • Tutorial Mode – Learn game basics, such as how to control characters during exploration and combat.

Changes from the Open Beta Version

  • In the quest “Sephira’s Sanguine Glimmer,” HP and ATK have been reduced for the enemy “Aquila Ruby Golem.”
  • Character artwork in the main menu has been updated.
  • Seofon has been added as a playable character. The famed Star Sword Sovereign unlocks differently from most characters in the full game, but players can now try him out in the demo.
  • Fixes have been implemented for issues related to cooperative matching.

Notes

  • Demo content may vary from the full game.
  • Progress made in this demo will automatically save. Data can’t be saved or loaded manually.
  • Demo data can’t be carried over to the full game.
  • If saved data for clearing the demo is lost or erased, demo rewards can’t be claimed.
  • Demo rewards will become available to claim upon the release of Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok.
  • A Nintendo Switch Online Membership is required to access online multiplayer features on the Nintendo Switch 2.
  • A PlayStation Plus membership is not required to access online multiplayer features on the PlayStation 5 or PlayStation 4.
  • ❮
  • ❯

And here are the latest details:

Third Trailer: The Journey So Far

The “Second Trailer” originally released for Granblue Fantasy: Relink has been revisited to include elements from Endless Ragnarok. By combining Relink’s story and Endless Ragnarok‘s new combat and gameplay, “The Journey So Far” demonstrates the high-flying spirit of adventure in the Sky Realm.

Unlocking New Story Content and The Conflux

Endless Ragnarok is an expansive new addition to Granblue Fantasy: Relink.

Clear the quest “The Tale of Bahamut’s Rage” in Relink to unlock Chaos-difficulty quests and embark on Endless Ragnarok‘s story. Summons, an all-new battle mechanic, will be unlocked upon beginning Endless Ragnarok‘s story and obtaining your first Summon. These powerful allies may be used in Chaos-difficulty or higher quests.

How to Unlock The Conflux

The Conflux, a new solo gameplay mode, can be unlocked by playing through a newly added side quest in Seedhollow. The side quest becomes available during Chapter 6 of the main story and unlocks the first Cycle of the Conflux.

Furthermore, Cycles two and three of the Conflux can also be unlocked in Relink as the player progresses through the main story.

To unlock each Cycle:

  • Cycle 1: Start the side quest added in Chapter 6.
  • Cycle 2: Progress through Hard-difficulty quests.
  • Cycle 3: Progress through Maniac-difficulty quests.
  • Deeper Cycles: Progress through the story of Endless Ragnarok.

Each Cycle rewards different upgrade materials:

  • Cycle 1: Obtain weapon forging materials.
  • Cycle 2: Obtain sigil upgrade materials.
  • Cycle 3: Obtain weapon uncap / awakening materials and rare sigils.

How to Unlock New Playable Characters

Each of the six new playable characters is unlocked differently:

  • Beatrix, Eustace – Trade Crewmate Cards at the Knicknack Shack. Additional ways to obtain Crewmate Cards will be added in the full game.
  • Gallanza, Maglielle – During Chapter Ø of Relink, progress through Hard-difficulty quests until a certain cutscene plays to obtain unique Crewmate Cards. These can be traded at the Knicknack Shack.
  • Fraux, Fediel – Progress through Endless Ragnarok‘s story to have these characters join your crew.

Major Update for Relink with the Release of Endless Ragnarok

In addition to the new features to be added with Endless Ragnarok, Granblue Fantasy: Relink will also receive a major update. To make the game more accessible and enjoyable, a number of quality-of-life improvements will be implemented along with overall game rebalancing and the addition of new side quests. More details will be shared in the livestream scheduled for Wednesday, July 8 (JST). The patch notes will also be posted to the Endless Ragnarok website at the same time.

Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok is due out for PlayStation 5, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, and PC via Steam on July 9.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Third Trailer “The Journey So Far”

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/granblue-fantasy-relink-endless-ragnarok-demo-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Romance of the Three Kingdoms XIV Complete Edition announced for PS5, PS4, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch

Due out on September 10 in Japan and Asia.

Publisher Koei Tecmo and developer Kou Shibusawa have announced Romance of the Three Kingdoms XIV Complete Edition for PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC (Steam). It will launch on September 10 in Japan and Asia. The PlayStation 5 and PC versions will support Japanese, Korean, Traditional Chinese, and Simplified Chinese language options, while the PlayStation 4 and Switch versions will have individual Japanese, Korean, and Chinese (Traditional and Simplified) SKUs.

Romance of the Three Kingdoms XIV Complete Edition includes the Romance of the Three Kingdoms XIV base game, the downloadable content “Diplomacy and Strategy Expansion Pack Bundle,” Season Pass, Season Pass 2, and new content added in the Complete Edition.

In Japan, the game will be available in the following editions:

  • For Users Who Do Not Already Own Romance of the Three Kingdoms XIV: Diplomacy and Strategy Expansion Pack Bundle
    • Physical
      • PlayStation 5 / Switch (9,680 yen)
      • Windows (Steam) (10,780 yen)
    • Digital
      • PlayStation 5 / PlayStation 4 / Switch / Steam (9,680 yen)
  • For Users Who Already Own Romance of the Three Kingdoms XIV: Diplomacy and Strategy Expansion Pack Bundle
    • Digital
      • Complete Edition Upgrade Pack (PlayStation 4 / Switch/ Steam) (4,950 yen)

Here is an overview of the new edition, via its Steam page:

About

The complete edition of Romance of the Three Kingdoms XIV now available for the 40th anniversary of the Romance of the Three Kingdoms series. A more substantial Three Kingdoms experience focused on strategy!

Key Features

  • Featuring Scenic Spots, Literature, and Historical Events – Experience a more detailed version of the Three Kingdoms world with more than 100 scenic spots across China, famed works of literature, and 190 historical events—the greatest number in the series’ history.
  • Understand Military Situations as They Develop – Make use of information about military situations gathered during reconnaissance and the like to gain advantages during diplomacy and schemes. This new form of offense and defense will give rise to even greater forms of tactical warfare.
  • Take advantage of Merit and Policies – Help your subordinates grow by earning Merit, and then use the Principle Points you earn to enact various Policies among your forces. Development and personal growth are the keys to success!
  • A Range of New Elements – Enjoy a variety of new elements that make this an even more enjoyable experience, including the Expertise Mode in Scenario Settings where you can set detailed values for things like Tactics damage, along with the Employ Officer command, additional scenarios, and more.

Note

  • To use this product, you must also have the base game of Romance of the Three Kingdoms XIV.
  • Purchasing this product will provide you with the new Complete Edition elements, along with any of the following items you do not already own: the Romance of the Three Kingdoms XIV Upgrade Pack, Romance of the Three Kingdoms XIV Season Pass, and Romance of the Three Kingdoms XIV Season Pass 2.
  • The Romance of the Three Kingdoms XIV Complete Edition Bundle, including Romance of the Three Kingdoms XIV and Romance of the Three Kingdoms XIV Complete Edition Upgrade Pack, is also available. Please be sure to avoid making duplicate purchases.
  • Please see the official site for more details.

In related news, Koei Tecmo also announced that total sales for the Romance of the Three Kingdoms XIV series have surpassed one million units.

Watch the Complete Edition teaser trailer below. Visit the official website here.

Teaser Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/romance-of-the-three-kingdoms-xiv-complete-edition-announced-for-ps5-ps4-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Street Fighter 6 DLC character Yasmine launches August 3
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Yasmine cuts loose to demonstrate the Filipino martial art of Eskrima.

Street Fighter 6 Year 4 downloadable content character Yasmine will launch on August 3, Capcom announced.

Here is an overview of Yasmine, via Capcom:

Hailing from the Philippines, Yasmine learned how to fight alongside her Kuya (older brother) under the guidance of her Lolo (grandfather). Following the sudden disappearance of her brother, Yasmine put down her Karambit knife until FooTube videos of a certain French supermodel inspired her to cut a path to her lost sibling. On her journey of discovery, Yasmine will use various high-speed Eskrima techniques such as:

  • Daloy ng Tubig – A quick forward-moving knife attack that can set-up or extend combos
  • Alon – A follow-up attack from Daloy ng Tubig where Yasmine lashes out with a multi-slice hit that ends differently depending upon the strength used for the attack, with successful strikes placing Yasmine in a powered-up state (Bayani Mode)
  • Talim ng Hangin – Yasmine spins forward in a low sweep that can either close distance with opponents or bait out their attacks based upon the strength used, with successful hits placing her in Bayani Mode
  • Mukha ng Langit – Yasmine leaps into a front flip that can mix up opponents with either a forward swipe or an upside-down spinning back hit
  • Lipad ng Agila – A multi-hit attack where Yasmine leaps into the air in a flurry of kicks
  • Pangil sa Likuran – A swirling projectile that lashes out at varying speeds so Yasmine can chase down and open up her opponent
  • Hiwa ng Kalangitan – Yasmine’s Level 1 Super Art sees her kick her opponent into the air, then slam them back down before transitioning into Bayani Mode
  • Nakatagong Lakas – During Yasmine’s Level 2 Super Art she focuses her energy for a limited time boost that allows her to use special moves while staying in Bayani Mode. She can also use Linya ng Liwanag during this Super Art where she dashes past an opponent and attacks them from behind.
  • Pamumukadkad ng Sampaguita – Yasmine’s Level 3 Super Art where she spins an opponent and gathers energy before pulverizing them in an all-out attack

Yasmine will be unlocked and ready to cut class (and her opponents) on August 3 for players who own or purchase the Year 4 Character Pass or Year 4 Ultimate Pass. Yasmine’s Outfit 1 showcases her in Eskrima combat attire, while Outfit 2 depicts Yasmine in her school uniform between bouts. Outfit 2 can be unlocked by maxing out her Acquisition Gauge in Avatar Arcade Mode or with Fighter Coins.

Yasmine is the first character to be released from the upcoming Year 4 roster including Arjun, Tifa from the Final Fantasy VII Remake series, and Bosch. Yasmine’s release will also coincide with Battle Balance adjustments for the entire Street Fighter 6 roster, so check out the Battle Change List before maintenance starts.

Street Fighter 6 is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, and PC via Steam.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

DLC Character Yasmine Gameplay Trailer

English

Japanese

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/street-fighter-6-dlc-character-yasmine-launches-august-3
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Call of Duty: Black Ops and Call of Duty: Black Ops II ports announced for ‘PlayStation’
item.content:encoded:
• PS4

Both will include Campaign, Multiplayer, and Zombies modes.

Publisher Activision and developers Treyarch and Iron Galaxy will release ported versions of Call of Duty: Black Ops and Call of Duty: Black Ops II for “PlayStation,” the companies announced. Specific platforms were not announced, so it is unclear whether the game will be available natively for PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5, or both.

Call of Duty: Black Ops originally launched for PlayStation 3, Xbox 360, Wii, DS, and PC on November 9, 2010. Call of Duty: Black Ops II launched or PlayStation 3, Xbox 360, and PC on November 13, 2012, followed by Wii U on November 18, 2012.

While the Xbox 360 and PC versions are still playable on modern hardware, through backwards compatibility or Steam, the PlayStation 3 versions are not compatible with PlayStation 4 and beyond.

The newly ported PlayStation versions will each include Campaign, Multiplayer, and Zombies modes.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/call-of-duty-black-ops-and-call-of-duty-black-ops-ii-ports-announced-for-playstation
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
